messages.text: about that flow, that gray hoodie and giant gym bag scream final
and u thought u could beat it 😳
i at least wanna try, coach me or clown me
leaning heavy toward clowning u rn
i figured, you look like you bully treadmills
i bully men who talk tough
you say that like it is new
nah just studying how trouble dresses for the bathroom
u sound very invested for a stranger
lowkey curious how much stamina you really have after that workout
bold for someone sitting on their phone
crazy part is i still think i could keep up
let me take you out this week
